occupation: Chief Commercial Officer & Board Member at Global
headline: Chief Commercial Officer - Global, the Media & Entertainment Group

experiences.title: Chief Commercial Officer & Board Member
experiences.description:
- Managing a team of 800 across UK & US 
- Created Global's Digital & Programmatic AD Platform - DAX, built into the world's biggest audio advertising platform and fastest growing programmatic outdoor platform. 
- Full P&L responsibility for revenue across audio, outdoor, digital, data and experiential. 
- Commercial lead on all acquisitions, partnerships and bids including the TFL partnership. 
- Post acquisition integration of three outdoor advertising business into one including restructure of all commercial teams 
- Created and executed new marketing and comms plans 
- Lead for a significant corporate hospitality & client engagement programmes and events.

experiences.title: Group Commercial Director
experiences.description:
- Managed national, local and international business units. Teams of 450
- Devised and built Global's highly successful programmatic ad tech business - DAX. Generating significant EBIT growth for the company
- Ran our Enterprise team - created HEART BINGO - a multi million £ EBIT business.
- Led US and Canadian acquisition teams to expand commercial operations

experiences.title: Deputy Managing Director
experiences.description:
- Led an e-commerce business unit including Bingo, Gaming and Sports Betting
- Launched multiple digital products generating £35m EBIT
- News Corp International Digital Partner Programme lead.

experiences.title: Commercial Director
experiences.description:
- Launched new products in publishing and digital including managing a joint venture with the e-commerce platform 'brand alley'. 
- Ran the enterprise team including the Sunday Times Wine Club business venture. 
- Managed a revenue stream of £250m+

experiences.title: Managing Director
experiences.description:
- Business model transformation to achieve sustainable EBIT
- Built and managed a team of 100+
- M&A commercial lead
- Managing commercial, marketing. product and customer service teams across UK, France, Italy & Germany. 
- Led the sale of a company to a private equity group.
